Why Choose Us

Travel With Confidence

We don't just book trips, we build experiences rooted in 27 years of trust, deep local knowledge and genuine care for every traveller.

27 Years of Expertise

Founded in 1999 by Jai Malhotra, Life Trips is built on genuine ground-level knowledge of India's finest destinations. Every route, every resort and every safari zone has been personally explored, never just researched online.

B2B & B2C Partner

From families booking their first wildlife safari to travel agencies managing high-volume client groups, Life Trips serves both with the same level of care, efficiency and professional accountability.

100% Tailor-Made

We do not believe in one-size-fits-all itineraries. Share your travel goals with us and we will craft a plan that fits your schedule, group size and budget, with every detail considered in advance.

On-Ground Support

Our responsibility does not end at the booking confirmation. A dedicated coordinator monitors your trip from the day you depart until you are safely back home, available whenever you need us.

Our Signature Resorts

Handpicked Stays,
Personally Vetted

Every resort Life Trips recommends has been personally evaluated by Jai Malhotra. These are our partner properties, each chosen for comfort and location.

Wildlife Lodge
Virat Nagar, Sariska, Rajasthan
Wildlife · Rajasthan

Gulmohar Sariska Resort

Nestled close to the Sariska Tiger Reserve in the ancient Aravalli hills, Gulmohar Sariska places you right at the doorstep of one of Rajasthan's most captivating wildlife destinations. A perfect blend of natural surroundings and comfortable amenities.

Safari Access Restaurant Forest Views Bonfire
Chat on WhatsApp
Heritage Inn
Ayodhya, Uttar Pradesh
Pilgrimage · Uttar Pradesh

Hotel Shri Awadh Inn

Located in the sacred city of Ayodhya, Hotel Shri Awadh Inn offers a comfortable and spiritually connected stay for pilgrims visiting the birthplace of Lord Rama. Thoughtfully positioned near the key temples and ghats of this divine city.

Temple Proximity Satvik Meals Free Wi-Fi 24Hr Service
Chat on WhatsApp
Jungle Resort
Jim Corbett, Uttarakhand
Wildlife · Uttarakhand

Serenity Corbett Resort

True to its name, Serenity Corbett delivers complete calm amidst the forests of Jim Corbett National Park. Wake up to birdsong, take guided jungle walks and return to spacious, well-appointed rooms, the ideal way to experience India's oldest national park.

Safari Zone Nature Walks River Nearby Pool
Chat on WhatsApp
Adventure Camp
Rishikesh, Uttarakhand
Adventure · Uttarakhand

Camp Majestic

Perched on the Ganga's edge with the Himalayas as a backdrop, Camp Majestic lives up to its name. Swiss tents, campfire evenings and direct access to white-water rafting, bungee jumping and trekking make this one of Rishikesh's most complete experiences.

Ganga Rafting Swiss Tents Campfire Trekking
Chat on WhatsApp
Adventure Camp
Rishikesh, Uttarakhand
Adventure · Uttarakhand

Camp Cross Fire

Camp Cross Fire brings high-energy adventure to the Ganga's edge. Known for its vibrant atmosphere, team-building activities and an exciting adventure sports menu, a favourite for group trips, corporate outings and anyone seeking an unforgettable Rishikesh experience.

Group Activities River Rafting Corporate Stays Adventure Sports
Chat on WhatsApp
Luxury Villa
Ranthambore, Rajasthan
Wildlife · Rajasthan

Bagh Villa

Bagh Villa is an intimate luxury property near Ranthambore National Park that redefines the wildlife lodge experience. Beautifully designed villas, personalised service and expert safari guides strike the perfect balance between jungle immersion and refined comfort.

Tiger Safari Wellness Luxury Villas Fine Dining
Chat on WhatsApp
For Travel Trade

India's Reliable
B2B Travel Partner

For over two decades, travel agencies, tour operators and corporate travel planners across India have relied on Life Trips as their go-to Destination Management Company for North Indian destinations.

  • Exclusive net rates structured specifically for travel trade partners
  • A named account manager dedicated to your agency from day one
  • Quote turnaround within 4 working hours, no follow-up needed
  • End-to-end ground handling: accommodation, transport, guides and permits
  • Specialised MICE and corporate group travel solutions
  • FIT and GIT packages available year-round across all destinations

About the Founder

Jai Malhotra

Founder & Travel Expert, Life Trips

Jai Malhotra has spent the last 27 years doing one thing exceptionally well, creating journeys that matter. In an industry increasingly driven by algorithms and automated bookings, Jai has built Life Trips on an entirely different foundation: personal knowledge, deep destination expertise and a genuine belief that travel has the power to change lives.

Since 1999, Jai has worked across both the B2B and B2C segments of the Indian travel industry, building lasting relationships with travel agencies and corporates on one side, and crafting memorable holidays for thousands of individual travellers on the other. This dual expertise gives Life Trips a unique edge: the operational depth of a professional DMC combined with the personal warmth of a trusted travel planner.

Jai's specialisation covers North India's most iconic destinations, the wildlife reserves of Sariska, Ranthambore and Jim Corbett, the adventure and spiritual landscapes of Rishikesh and Uttarakhand, and the dramatic mountain territory of Himachal Pradesh.

"Every journey I plan, I ask myself one question, will this traveller come back with a story they'll tell for the rest of their life? If the answer is yes, we've done our job."

, Jai Malhotra, Founder, Life Trips
